creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
The only place where I can see dependency on the lang/python is in the TEST_DEPENDS and there I want exactly this one, as tests do use unversioned python all around and chasing all the occurrences of plain `python` is not worth it.

Also, USES+=python:2.7 explicitly sets the Python version in the environment, so I don't see any harm in adding lang/python later for the tests.
